title: Minecolonies x Macaws Paths and Pavers
description: A datapack that adds the `minecolonies:pathblocks` tag to all blocks found in Macaws Paths and Pavers vs 1.0.5-1.20.1
body: A datapack that adds the minecolonies:pathblocks tag to all blocks found in Macaws Paths and Pavers vs 1.0.5-1.20.1 to add support for Minecolonists to use them to path.
